name: Expansion Weapons
description: Pack of firearms and optics including RPG-7, M72 LAW, Taser, M9, K98, PP19, MP7, and more.
overview:
DayZ Expansion Weapons is a pack of firearms and optics that expands the DayZ arsenal.

## New Weapons

- Crossbow
- RPG-7
- M72 LAW
- M79 Grenade Launcher
- Taser X2 Defender
- M9
- Karabiner 98K
- Vityaz-SN PP19-01
- MP7
- Benelli M4
- DT11
- M14 Springfield
- M1A SOCOM
- PP-91 KEDR
- MP5A2
- MP5SD
- AWM
- And more...

## Features

- **Economy Integration** — Configurable spawn rates through types.xml
- **Market Support** — Fully compatible with Expansion Market for trading
- **Optics & Attachments** — Scopes and other weapon accessories included
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @DayZ-Expansion-Weapons to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Add weapon classnames to your types.xml for loot spawning.
Optionally configure weapons in your Market categories for trading.

troubleshooting.problem: Weapons not spawning in the world
troubleshooting.solution: Ensure weapon classnames are added to your types.xml with appropriate nominal values.
Both client and server must have the mod loaded. Check .bikey files.

useCases.title: Expanded Loot Table
useCases.description: Add Expansion weapons to types.xml for more loot variety across military and civilian areas.

useCases.title: Trader Weapons
useCases.description: Include Expansion weapons in Market categories for players to buy and sell.
